backlog_issues.title: Agentic OS Conductor Log
504 GTM container backups failing: Tag Manager API 429 quota exceeded (2 consecutive weekly runs)
Fleet: upload-pages-artifact@v5 silently drops dot-entries — .well-known/security.txt 404s on affected sites
Testing target: full WordPress→Pages cutover of technologymonastery.org (epic)
ffcadmin: per-repo claim sweep (hub 737 sweep can no longer cover it)
Consolidate Cloudflare record-writing: one engine for the apex/www Pages standard + shared API lib
Canary drill: prove the smoke engine catches each failure class it claims (child of #752)
Migrate remaining value out of FFC-IN-AI-Management into the hub (inventory + first tranche)
Standardize on pnpm across FFC templates and repos (migrated from FFC-IN-AI-Management#9)
Build a custom WHMCS MCP server (migrated from FFC-IN-AI-Management#3)
Build a custom Zeffy MCP server (migrated from FFC-IN-AI-Management#2)
Fleet sync: smoke engine v3.2 (Zeffy donation-embed check) to all FFC-EX repos + Zeffy inventory
120 cname-flip conflicts with build-emitted CNAME repos (gap from #728 dry-run exercise)
Weekly process-health metrics report to #719 (child of #752)
Epic: process assurance — verify the Agentic OS's own processes keep working (monitor the monitors)
Conditional basePath missing: default-Pages-URL sites serve pages with 404 assets (technomonasteries, Footer_Only_Template; audit fleet)
Fleet-status donation badges + campaigns dashboard page on ffcadmin (child of #745)
Campaign registry collector: sweep live fleet sites for Zeffy URLs into campaigns-registry.json (child of #745)
Epic: charity campaign registry — capture and track every Zeffy campaign across FFC-supported sites, surfaced in the dashboards
Publish FFC Zeffy campaign list for smoke auto-classification (charity-specific vs ffc-interim donations)
fleet-status generator v2: derive site identity from Pages config, not the CNAME file (child of #738)
Epic: unify fleet smoke patterns into one Agentic-OS-integrated verification system with public visual fleet status
Repo hygiene for the cutover test target FFC-EX-technologymonastery.org (child of #726)

in_flight_prs.title: fix(docs): safety-table rows for gated 703/720 + checker guard against gated EXCLUDE entries

- FFC-IN-ffcadmin.org#654 (/agentic-os render, Half 2 of #723): reviewed — shape-guarded loader, all 4 Copilot threads resolved, 502 delivery paths verified — ready → queue → **MERGED**, deploy green 22:06Z, page verified live (200). Closed ffcadmin#646. With #723 already closed, the status-page epic (#732 feed + #654 ren…

conductor_log.body:
## Late-evening block: MCHS green, Sentry pilot, security + toolchain — 2026-07-19 (run 4 follow-ups 20-23, Clarke-directed)

**Mitchell County History (FFC-EX-mitchellnchistory.org): first fully-green smoke in repo history.** GTM was wired all along (spec raced lazyOnload — fixed PR #169); donations correctly classified as PayPal/non-preferred (engine **v3.4/v3.4.1** fleet-wide: tri-state donation model — none=FAIL / non-preferred provider=PASS+standing `donation-migration` issue / Zeffy=PASS —…

conductor_log.author: clarkemoyer
conductor_log.body:
## Conductor run 9 — END (2026-07-20, autonomous)

**Ran during a GitHub minor outage** (API Requests + Actions partial_outage, Issues + Pages degraded from ~01:05Z): all REST reads worked, issue-comment writes 503'd — start/end log comments were queued to a bounded retry loop and posted once writes recovered. Run kept deliberately read-only beyond that.

- **Gates**: same 9 stale waiting runs as run 8 (5× 502 GA 07-12→07-18, 4× 726 Drift 07-13→07-17). Standing decision unchanged: all pre-fix co…
